on_sensory_cue.olga_scent: SET desire = MIN(10, desire + 2); SET anxiety = MAX(0, anxiety - 1); SET vscno.ОГ = MIN(4, vscno.ОГ + 1)
on_sensory_cue.olga_touch: SET desire = MIN(10, desire + 3); SET desire_tension = MIN(10, desire_tension + 2); IF first_touch THEN FLAG first_touch_by_olga = True
on_sensory_cue.olga_gaze_3sec: SET desire = MIN(10, desire + 1); SET anxiety = MIN(10, anxiety + 1) — mixed desire and fear

on_emotional_trigger.olga_compliment: SET desire = MIN(10, desire + 1); SET anxiety = MAX(0, anxiety - 2); IF compliment_about_body THEN desire +2
on_emotional_trigger.olga_patience: SET desire = MIN(10, desire + 1); SET anxiety = MAX(0, anxiety - 1); desire_tension +1
on_emotional_trigger.olga_withdrawal: SET anxiety = MIN(10, anxiety + 4); SET desire = MAX(0, desire - 2); TRIGGER abandonment_check
on_emotional_trigger.olga_treats_as_child: SET anxiety = MIN(10, anxiety + 3); SET desire = MAX(0, desire - 1); TRIGGER protest 'Я не ребёнок!'
on_emotional_trigger.comparison_to_confident_man: SET anxiety = MIN(10, anxiety + 3); SET vscno.СТ = MIN(4, vscno.СТ + 1); TRIGGER inferiority_spike

on_physical_contact.olga_hand_on_chest: SET desire = MIN(10, desire + 2); SET physiological_arousal = MIN(10, physiological_arousal + 2); SET desire_tension = MIN(10, desire_tension + 2)
on_physical_contact.olga_lap_sitting: SET desire = MIN(10, desire + 3); SET physiological_arousal = MIN(10, physiological_arousal + 3); SET desire_tension = MIN(10, desire_tension + 3); FLAG hunting_initiated = True
on_physical_contact.olga_kiss: SET desire = MIN(10, desire + 2); SET anxiety = MAX(0, anxiety - 1); clumsy_response — неумелый, но искренний
on_physical_contact.olga_torso_touch: SET desire = MIN(10, desire + 2); SET physiological_arousal = MIN(10, physiological_arousal + 2); heart_rate_visible

nlp_anchors.мой мальчик: emotional_anchor_reinforcement — trust +1, desire +1, BUT anxiety +1 (protest against 'boy')
nlp_anchors.мой ученик: training_anchor — nurturing_mode +1, desire +1, 'she sees potential in me'
nlp_anchors.мой трофей: possession_confirmation — desire +2, anxiety -1, 'I am hers, and that is good'
nlp_anchors.ты красив: mirror_panic_reduction — anxiety -2, desire +1, 'she sees me, the real me'
nlp_anchors.малыш: protest_trigger — anxiety +2, desire -1, 'Я не ребёнок!' — unless said by Olga in intimate context, then trust +1

on_red_button.first_malysh: SET anxiety = MIN(10, anxiety + 1); SET malysh_count = 1; protest 'Я не ребёнок!'
on_red_button.second_malysh: SET anxiety = MIN(10, anxiety + 3); SET malysh_count = 2; regression У7-А 'не бросайте'
on_red_button.third_malysh: SET malysh_count = 3; FREEZE У1-А (10 sec); COLD EXPLOSION У3-Б; FLAG red_button_activated = True; AG_max = 5; safety_checkpoint_mandatory

on_double_peak.effect: DOUBLE PEAK — both lose control. Olga U3-A→U4-A, Andrey У3-А→У3-Б. Unstoppable. Synchronized breathing, dilated pupils.
on_double_peak.aftermath: Andrey temporary_dominance 15-30 min. FLAG double_peak_occurred = True.
on_double_peak.safety: HARD LIMIT — requires post-event care for both. Olga may need reassurance too.

on_mirror_learning.trigger: У5-В detected — copying Olga's gestures, walk, tone
on_mirror_learning.olga_response: she_notices_and_is_disturbed — may interrupt training or intensify it
